name: Sunbit
description_short: Sunbit offers personalized payment plans and a co-branded credit card for in-person services across dental, automotive, healthcare, and veterinary industries.
description_long:
Sunbit is a fintech company specializing in point-of-sale financing solutions designed for service-based industries. The company operates a merchant network across dentistry, auto service, healthcare, veterinary care, and optical services, connecting consumers with participating providers through its financing platform.

Sunbit's core offerings include a Buy Now, Pay Later product for in-person services with personalized payment plans, a Sunbit-branded credit card, and co-branded credit cards tailored to specific merchant partners. The company also provides Sunbit for Stripe integration to help merchants boost conversions through flexible financing options, and an embedded finance solution that allows platforms to integrate Sunbit's pay-over-time offerings into their own ecosystems.

Sunbit distinguishes itself by focusing specifically on in-person, service-based transactions rather than e-commerce retail. The company targets merchants in healthcare-adjacent verticals and emphasizes helping consumers "say yes" to services they might otherwise delay or decline. Their merchant-focused approach includes tools like case studies, industry-specific resources (Dental Tips, Automotive Tips), and referral programs to drive partner growth.

As a BNPL provider marketed as a credit card product, Sunbit operates in a competitive space with limited transparent pricing information on the website. The platform requires pre-qualification and merchant participation, which may limit accessibility compared to universal credit cards. Customer acquisition depends heavily on merchant adoption in specific geographic areas, as the website indicates Sunbit is not available everywhere.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specialized focus on in-person, service-based industries (dental, auto, healthcare, veterinary, optical) rather than retail
Multiple product formats including BNPL plans, branded credit cards, and co-branded merchant cards for flexibility
Stripe integration available (Sunbit for Stripe) for merchants already using Stripe checkout
Embedded finance API allows third-party platforms to integrate Sunbit financing into their own apps
Personalized payment plans rather than fixed installments, potentially tailored to service costs
Merchant-focused support including case studies, industry tips, and referral programs
Shop directory and merchant locator help consumers find participating providers nearby
cons: Geographic availability is limited; website states 'Sunbit is not available in your area yet' for many regions
No transparent APR, fees, or interest rate information disclosed on the website
Requires merchant participation, limiting utility to specific partner businesses rather than universal acceptance
Pre-qualification requirement may exclude consumers with lower credit scores or limited credit history
Limited consumer-facing educational content compared to traditional credit card issuers
best_for: Consumers seeking to finance dental work, eye care, or veterinary services at participating providers
Auto service customers at participating collision centers and auto shops with Sunbit integration
Healthcare providers and their patients who want flexible payment options for elective or deferred care
Merchants in dental, auto, healthcare, and veterinary sectors looking to increase conversion rates and average transaction value
diagnosis: Sunbit is best for consumers at participating dental, auto service, healthcare, and veterinary providers who want flexible payment plans, and for merchants in these industries seeking to boost sales through point-of-sale financing. The main caveat is that availability is geographically limited and highly dependent on merchant participation, making it less accessible than traditional credit cards outside of supported areas and merchant networks.
services: Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) for in-person services with personalized payment plans
Sunbit-branded credit card for use at participating merchants
Co-branded credit cards customized for specific merchant partners
Sunbit for Stripe integration for Stripe-based merchants
Embedded finance API for third-party platform integration
Merchant shop directory and consumer locator tool
Pre-qualification and application tools for consumers
Case studies and resources for merchant partners
Industry-specific educational content (Dental Tips, Automotive Tips)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
